criteria.budgetStrategy: Driving trip, off-site or value lodging, limited park days, and careful ticket selection. Disney resort packages are unlikely under this budget for six people unless there is an unusually strong promotion.
preferredResortTypes: Value resort if major promotion appears
mustHave: Works for a three-year-old, six-year-old, teenagers, and two adults
Total estimate close to 2000 to 3000 dollars
niceToHave: One character meal option if the budget survives

agent.summary:
```json
{
  "summary": "The Bell family is planning a Walt Disney World trip driving from the Texarkana/Genoa area, targeting a budget of $2,000 to $3,000 for six people. The best realistic option is a driving trip with off-site hotel lodging combined with 1 Disney park day, estimated around $2,850, fitting well within the budget and family needs. Better Disney experiences like 2 park days or Disney value resort promotions exceed the budget significantly and should be considered only if strong discounts appear. Key sources were checked, but no new price signals were found. The family should watch for hotel deals under $150/night and ticket promotions to keep the total under $3,000.",
  "bestMove": {
    "id": "drive-offsite-one-park-day",
    "title": "Drive + off-site hotel + 1 Disney park day",
    "estimatedTotal": 2850,
    "summary": "Most realistic path to Disney inside the $2,000–$3,000 target. It keeps the magic, but limits park tickets.",
    "action": "Watch for hotel rooms under $150/night and ticket promos. Book only when the real total stays under $3,000.",
    "score": 87,
    "label": "Strong deal",
    "sourceUrl": "https://disneyworld.disney.go.com/special-offers/"
  },
  "watchItems": [
    {
      "id": "drive-good-neighbor-two-days",
      "title": "Drive + Good Neighbor hotel + 2 park days",
      "estimatedTotal": 3750,
      "summary": "Better Disney feel, but likely above budget unless a hotel or ticket discount appears.",
      "action": "Use as stretch target. Alert only if total drops near $3,000.",
      "score": 77,
      "label": "Worth watching",
      "sourceUrl": "https://disneyworld.disney.go.com/special-offers/"
    },
    {
      "id": "drive-disney-value-promo",
      "title": "Drive + Disney value resort promotion",
      "estimatedTotal": 4300,
      "summary": "Best experience, weakest budget fit. This only becomes interesting if Disney posts a major public offer.",
      "action": "Watch official Disney special offers. Do not book unless the full math changes.",
      "score": 71,
      "label": "Worth watching",
      "sourceUrl": "https://disneyworld.disney.go.com/special-offers/"
    }
  ],
  "recommendations": [
    "Focus on the 'Drive + off-site hotel + 1 Disney park day' option and verify hotel and ticket prices regularly.",
    "Seek hotel deals under $150 per night and monitor Disney park ticket promotions to keep total costs under $3,000.",
    "Use the two-park-day Good Neighbor hotel package and Disney value resort promotion only as stretch targets if significant discounts appear.",
    "Avoid booking until total verified costs including gas, lodging, tickets, food, and extras remain within budget.",
    "Consider free breakfast and shuttle services in off-site hotels to increase family comfort without adding costs.",
    "Target travel in lower crowd months such as January, February, May, September, November, or early December for better pricing and experience.",
    "Do not rely on unverified online sources or offers without confirming they apply to your specific dates and family size.",
    "Continue monitoring Walt Disney World Special Offers and tickets pages regularly for any new promotions."
  ],
  "textAlertDraft": "Disney Alert: The 'Drive + off-site hotel + 1 Disney park day' trip is currently estimated at $2,850. Please verify hotel and ticket prices today to ensure the total remains within your $3,000 budget before booking."
}
```
